payload.issue_title: Configurable Agent Pipeline: pipeline.yml Compilation & Template System
payload.notes: Wave 2. Depends on #1 (now completed). Implements pipeline.yml → loop-plan.json compiler with cycle[] and finalizer[] arrays, frontmatter fields, template directives ({{include:path}}, {{SUBAGENT_HINTS}}, etc.). dor_validated=false — refinement may be needed before dispatch.
